author: agenticbranduniverse.com/registry
description: An illustrated, narrated picture book. The reference hard case: identity must hold across every spread.

generators.pinReason: A locked character golden carries the identity, so any competent provider works.

perSlot.id: flat: no perspective, shading, gradients, or coloured linework
the spread's beat text is legible and unmangled

crossSlot.id: every declared invariant of each bound character holds in every slot
crossSlot.scope: all slots binding the same character entity
crossSlot.against: the entity's locked master golden, never slot-to-slot
crossSlot.method: pass the locked master AND its written locked description into every slot; judge each slot in fresh context against the master, item by item over the entity's invariant list, never against the plan
crossSlot.note: Itemized because a gestalt 'same character?' passes while a specific invariant fails. Against the golden because slots drift together and read as consistent.

notes: Runtime requirement: this is the projection whose run is long enough that nobody watches it. Park a defective spread, finish the rest, report.
